subject: Revert "Migrate to gerrit-maven-stage (VID)"
commit_message:
Revert "Migrate to gerrit-maven-stage (VID)"

This reverts commit 44505674

Change-Id: Ia2d560c4651c4c8e6d25ca911ccedda43eb3a6b7
Issue-ID: CIMAN-234
Signed-off-by: Ittay Stern <ittay.stern@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/vid-master-verify-java/815/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/vid-master-verify-java/815

Patch Set 1:

Latest issue is:
[ERROR] npm ERR! notarget No compatible version found: @jest/test-result@^24.8.0

IMO is faster to resolve this and call the migration done than reverting back to cero. 

I am going to try running this again with no tests.

Patch Set 1:

Maybe we can try a better version of node and npm in 
frontend-maven-plugin configuration in vid-app-common/pom.xml?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Maybe we can try a better version of node and npm in 
> frontend-maven-plugin configuration in vid-app-common/pom.xml?

It's not an npm-version issue. We saw it nicely built on a different machines. (e.g. https://jenkins.onap.org/view/vid/job/vid-master-release-version-java-daily/897/).

Although I would like to push forward the migration, for now it's blocking us from releasing a fix to integrators.
Given that failing build was not resolved over several days, I will be very happy to revert for a day or two, release our patches, then retry with the migration.

What do you say?

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> > Patch Set 1:
> > 
> > Maybe we can try a better version of node and npm in 
> > frontend-maven-plugin configuration in vid-app-common/pom.xml?
> 
> It's not an npm-version issue. We saw it nicely built on a different machines. (e.g. https://jenkins.onap.org/view/vid/job/vid-master-release-version-java-daily/897/).
> 
> Although I would like to push forward the migration, for now it's blocking us from releasing a fix to integrators.
> Given that failing build was not resolved over several days, I will be very happy to revert for a day or two, release our patches, then retry with the migration.
> 
> What do you say?

Sounds good to me.. Please feel free to schedule any time in my calendar whenever you are ready and we can work on it
Change has been successfully merged by Amichai Hemli
